Nanapasi has a triumphant gleam in his eye.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Visibly impressed with himself, Nanapasi gleefully informs you of the successful completion of his magnum opus, a modern-day recreation of the grand Little Ladies' Day decorations from the Thorne Dynasty days. As a token of his appreciation for the role you played in making this possible, he invites you to be present at the moment of its grand unveiling before his daughter Ninimo. Make your way to Emerald Avenue and await father and daughter there.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
